title: PublishedComponentSet
description: A published component set from a team or file library.

key.description: The globally unique identifier for the component set.

file_key.description: The key of the Figma file containing the component set.

node_id.description: The node ID of the component set within the file.

thumbnail_url.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the component set.

name.description: The name of the component set.

description.description: The description of the component set.
